name: 60" Laguna Nigel Fluted Wooden Console Table Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Give your living space a functional piece with stunning style with this Laguna Nigel Fluted Wooden Console Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted from wood, this rectangular console table features a spacious tabletop to showcase framed photos, potted plants and more, while the built-in bottom shelf provides extra space for storage or display. In a solid brown hue with fluted design, this console table easily blends into a variety of settings, whether you place it in your living room, entryway or any other area.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
